criteria.name: Technical Skills
criteria.description: Depth in React, TypeScript, API integration, and frontend engineering practices.
criteria.evaluationGuidance: Look for production experience, sound architecture decisions, and evidence of required skills.

criteria.name: Relevant Experience
criteria.description: Experience delivering frontend products at a level appropriate for a senior role.
criteria.evaluationGuidance: Consider years, scope, ownership, and similarity to the work described in the role.

criteria.name: Problem Solving
criteria.description: Ability to investigate ambiguous technical problems and produce measurable improvements.
criteria.evaluationGuidance: Prefer specific examples that explain diagnosis, tradeoffs, actions, and outcomes.

criteria.name: Communication
criteria.description: Clarity when explaining technical work, decisions, and collaboration.
criteria.evaluationGuidance: Assess structure, specificity, audience awareness, and collaborative communication.

criteria.name: Role Motivation
criteria.description: Alignment between the candidate's goals and the responsibilities of the role.
criteria.evaluationGuidance: Look for informed interest in the work rather than generic enthusiasm.
